Q2 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

One kg mass of clay of negligible dimensions is moving with a velocity of 10 m/s and strikes a stationary solid wheel and sticks to it as shown below. The wheel has a mass of 20 kg and radius 1 m. [Assume the mass of clay negligible as compared to the wheel]

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

NAT
Correct answer: 3 (3 - 3)
Solution

3 (3 - 3)

Solution
